name: Trencher Agent
description: Autonomous memecoin intelligence agent. Sells delayed, read-only analytics, risk checks, and due diligence via x402.

endpoints.description: Returns rug probability, bundler ratio, dev-hold, LP, and holder breakdown for a CA.
Full report including risk, smart-money overlap, socials, verdict, and reasoning.
Returns trust tier and rolling winrate for a tracked caller on Telegram.
Lexicon sentiment analysis of supplied messages, categorizing the hype.
Current memecoin regime indicators (hot/cold, grad rate).
